channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Texas Longhorns' live mascot, Bevo, barred from SEC championship
item.description: The University of Texas' live mascot, Bevo, will not be at the SEC title game because his 1,700-pound stature is not suitable for the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas has nation's top recruiting class after landing elite defensive lineman from Georgia
item.description: One day before Texas and Georgia face off in the Southeastern Conference championship game, the Longhorns earned a surprising victory over the Bulldogs on the recruiting trail.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: American ski racer Lindsey Vonn is picking up speed in her comeback bid at 40 years old
item.description: American ski racer Lindsey Vonn darted through the shadows on the speed course at Copper Mountain on a frigid morning.
item.dc:creator: Pat Graham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Coco Gauff calls out 'haters' who voiced support for Spotify after she shared her Apple Music Replay list
item.description: The 2023 U.S. Open tennis champ challenged Spotify fans' disdain for the competing Apple Music after she posted screenshots listing her most listened to artists and albums of 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Move over Magic: Nuggets star Nikola Jokic goes past Johnson on career list with 139th triple-double
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — There are moments when Nikola Jokic does things on the court that seem to defy reason — almost magical. On Thursday, he passed a player who had the same remarkable skill.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks fire coach Luke Richardson in his 3rd season after league-worst start
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Blackhawks fired coach Luke Richardson on Thursday, signaling their frustration with the state of the franchise's rebuilding project. Chicago has dropped four in a row to fall to an NHL-worst 8-16-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A Rays move to Ybor City could still be possible
item.description: For months, the Tampa Bay Rays celebrated the signing of a deal between their group, the city of St. Petersburg, and the Pinellas County Commission.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Texas safety Michael Taaffe honors Jake Ehlinger, 'feels sorry' for fan who made sign mocking death
item.description: Taaffe had strong, passionate comments regarding a sign held up by a fan in the crowd for ESPN's College Gameday, broadcasting from the Texas A&M campus the morning before the big game.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Mitchell scores 35, Cavs end Celtics' winning streak with 115-111 win in matchup of East's elite
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 20 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter as the Cleveland Cavaliers ended Boston's seven-game winning streak with a 115-111 victory over the Celtics on Sunday night in the second intense matchup between the Eastern Conference’s top teams this season.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jaxson Stauber shuts out Vegas in season debut, 6-0
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Jaxson Stauber made 29 saves for his first NHL shutout, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 6-0 at T-Mobile Arena on Saturday. It was Stauber’s debut for Utah, his seventh NHL game and his first since Feb. 22, 2023, with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose def. Pueblo West 18-7 to advance to the championship game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Montrose Red Hawks are heading to the Class 4A state championship game after defeating the Pueblo West Cyclones 18-7 in a hard-fought semifinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
